stadium.name: The Sinking Field
stadium.description: A notoriously poorly-maintained stadium built on reclaimed marshland. The ground is unstable, often waterlogged, and sections of the stands are known to collapse.

stats.pregame_ritual: Seeing who on the team can belch the loudest.
Meditating silently in the corner of the locker room.
Clapping their hands a prime number of times.
Insisting on being the last player to leave the locker room.
Daring a teammate to eat a live worm.
Thanking their armor for the protection it's about to offer.
Counting the number of clouds in the sky.
Tapping each piece of their armor in a specific sequence.
Insisting on being the last player to leave the locker room.
Singing a sea shanty completely out of tune.
Polishing their boots with bacon grease.
Meditating silently in the corner of the locker room.
Clapping their hands a prime number of times.
Insisting on being the last player to leave the locker room.
Daring a teammate to eat a live worm.

Insisting on being the last player to leave the locker room.
Polishing their boots with bacon grease.
Thanking their armor for the protection it's about to offer.
Singing a sea shanty completely out of tune.

stadium.name: The Stronghold Bailey
stadium.description: The team plays in the central bailey of Stronghold Castle, a massive fortress built on a plateau overlooking the city. The field is packed earth and cobblestone, and the crowd watches from the surrounding stone ramparts.

stats.pregame_ritual: Leading the team in a synchronized chant that slowly gets louder.
Searching for a four-leaf clover near the sidelines.
Reciting a short, epic poem about a past victory.
Sharing a piece of fermented fish with a teammate.
Listening to the wind for a sign of which way the game will turn.
Eating a piece of honeycomb to 'sweeten' their victory.
Collecting a pebble from every field they've ever played on.
Tugging on their left earlobe three times.
Seeing who on the team can belch the loudest.
Tying a red string around their pinky finger.
Sharing a piece of fermented fish with a teammate.
Searching for a four-leaf clover near the sidelines.
Reciting a short, epic poem about a past victory.
Sharing a piece of fermented fish with a teammate.
Listening to the wind for a sign of which way the game will turn.
Seeing who on the team can belch the loudest.
Tugging on their left earlobe three times.

Eating a piece of honeycomb to 'sweeten' their victory.
Tying a red string around their pinky finger.
Collecting a pebble from every field they've ever played on.

preGame:
Folks, gather 'round, you glorious denizens of Osterra! Tonight, on this very sacred patch of marshland known as The Sinking Field, we witness not just a Trollball contest, but the very crucible of champions! This Grand Finals Bracket Reset is the ultimate gladiatorial spectacle, a clash where only one dynasty shall endure! The home squad, the magnificent Ebon Gate Corruptors, draped in the infernal sponsorship of Demon Lord Orzalon, are ready to unleash utter mayhem from the unstable, muck-soaked terrain of their home fortress! These fellas are steeped in glorious grime; they are the masters of the Thick Mud and the Noxious Fumes, and they crave that Sinkhole action with a demonic hunger! 

Across from them, battling the elements and the beasts of the Everwar, are the valiant, if slightly overly earnest, New Ravenfall Commanders, backed by the proud Kingdom of Eponore! They bring the hopes of the realm with them, striving to prove that pedigree outweighs pestilence! But let us not forget the ritualistic fervor of the combatants! While the Ravenfall squad boasts Rhett Gavrilla, who meticulously collects a pebble from every field he’s ever graced, it is the Corruptors who bring the true theatrical flair! Witness Amedeo Bari, who takes a moment before kickoff to polish his boots with glorious, fatty bacon grease—a testament to true demonic pride!

Oh, the violence we anticipate! This isn't some polite scuffle in the high courts; this is a rugby-football brawl fought with axes and blades in thick, sulfuric soup! Will the Commanders manage their synchronized chant to rattle the very stone of The Sinking Field, or will the Corruptors just let their players wallow in the glorious filth and crush their opposition beneath their spiked boots? You simply have to be there to witness this monumental clash!
postGame:
And what a magnificent, mud-churning, foul-smelling affair it was! Folks, I tell you, the heavens themselves wept sulfur tonight as The Ebon Gate Corruptors utterly dismantled the ambitions of the New Ravenfall Commanders! The final, glorious tally reads TWO for the Ebon Gate Corruptors and a resounding ZERO for the Commanders! The Corruptors take the victory in this titanic Battle Reset! 

From the opening whistle, it was a baptism by grime! The Commanders struggled immediately against the Sickhole modifier, getting Bogged Down like fresh troll bait! Ahasuerus An delivered the first thunderclap of violence, bringing Pirozzo Opal down in the mud, and Olnek Vizzone added another casualty to the Commander ranks, dropping Estes Adrian with a vicious tackle! The action surged, with Judi Carrington of the Corruptors driving the ball like a battering ram, passing it to Bullion Iglesias, and showcasing just how utterly superior the demonic grit is!

Halftime provided only a brief respite from the foul miasma, but the fight didn't ebb—it merely gathered steam! Into Overtime, the mud thickened, the fumes grew ranker, and the score remained frozen at 2-0! Smith Syst brought the heat, dropping Jessalin Zobias right into the muck, but the Commanders kept throwing wild passes! Then came the moment etched forever in the annals of this glorious sport! Ahasuerus An, defying the mire and the malice, surged forward, and with a mighty heave, sent the leather troll head soaring through the goal! SCORE! The Ebon Gate Corruptors take the lead in this final, brutal push!

The Commanders threw everything they had at them—Estes Adrian fired a desperate shot, but the gate stood firm! But in the end, the resilience, the sheer demonic *will*, of the Corruptors was too much to conquer! What a show of power! While the heroes of the realm might dabble in lofty quests, the Ebon Gate Corruptors remind us all that the truest champions are those who embrace the muck! Goodnight, faithful fans, and may your next viewing be as violently glorious!
